description: Sector overlay for French insurance undertakings, intermediaries, policyholder documents, underwriting, claims, distribution, AML/CFT, and customer-protection controls.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Insurance. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: ACPR authorization or insurance registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ACPR authorization, insurance undertaking, broker/intermediary registration, ORIAS, or regulated status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder information or claims-handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policyholder disclosures, claims handling, complaints, cancellation, exclusions, premium, or customer-protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Insurance AML/CFT evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for customer due diligence, beneficial ownership, suspicious reporting, high-risk products, or TRACFIN escalation.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder and claims-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for personal data, health data, claims records, privacy notice, retention, or GDPR/RGPD evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
